tasks.title: Decide to-prd-html producer status
tasks.description: Determine whether to-prd-html is a standalone lineage producer (gets its own enum value in provenance-schema) or whether HTML PRDs inherit provenance solely from the seed JSON they embed. This decision must be made before the producer enum is finalized in T-0003.
acceptance_criteria: A clear decision is recorded: to-prd-html is either added to the producer enum or explicitly excluded with rationale
The decision is documented as a comment in contracts/provenance-schema.json or in the seed

tasks.title: Decide kind/ref correlation enforcement strategy
tasks.description: Determine whether to enforce the kind/ref correlation in-schema via JSON Schema if/then (kind='session' requires ref=null; kind in ['seed','prd'] requires a non-null string ref), or leave it to prose convention. This decision affects the complexity of provenance-schema.json designed in T-0003.
acceptance_criteria: A clear decision is recorded: enforce via if/then or prose only
Rationale is noted (gold-plating risk vs. schema integrity)

tasks.title: Create contracts/provenance-schema.json
tasks.description: Create a new file contracts/provenance-schema.json with $id 'provenance-schema'. Define $defs.producer as a closed enum string covering all lineage-producing skills (to-tasks, to-seed, debug, code-review, improve-component, to-e2e-tasks, prototype, manual, and to-prd-html if T-0001 resolves that way). Define $defs.source as oneOf: a {kind: enum[seed,prd,session], ref: string|null} object or null (source=null means root of lineage chain). Apply if/then constraints on kind/ref correlation if T-0002 resolves that way. Write fixture instances for both valid and invalid cases and verify they validate/reject correctly against the schema.
acceptance_criteria: contracts/provenance-schema.json exists with $id 'provenance-schema'
$defs.producer is a closed enum with all lineage producers
$defs.source is oneOf: {kind, ref} object or null
A valid fixture instance with source=null validates clean
A valid fixture instance with source={kind:'seed', ref:'path'} validates clean
An invalid fixture (unknown producer) fails validation
Tests pass for all fixture scenarios

tasks.title: Upgrade validate-schema.sh for cross-file $ref, examples self-check, and version-mismatch messaging
tasks.description: Upgrade validate-schema.sh to: (1) build a referencing.Registry from all contracts/*.json keyed by bare $id so cross-file $ref resolves for all 11 calling skills (verify Python jsonschema >=4.18 for referencing.Registry API, or fall back to deprecated RefResolver for older versions); (2) add an examples[] self-validation meta-check that extracts examples[*] from a schema and validates each against that same schema; (3) emit a clear schema_version-mismatch error message pointing the user to regenerate via the appropriate skill, instead of a cryptic property error.
acceptance_criteria: A schema using cross-file $ref (e.g. {"$ref": "provenance-schema#/$defs/source"}) resolves correctly
A fixture instance that is valid against the full resolved schema validates clean
An old-version seed or task file fails with an explicit schema_version-mismatch message, not a generic property error
examples[*] self-validation catches an intentionally broken embedded example
All existing validate-schema.sh callers continue to work without changes
Tests pass for all three new behaviors

tasks.title: Update seed-schema.json to v3
tasks.description: Update contracts/seed-schema.json to schema_version 3: rename the existing 'source' field to 'producer' (referencing $defs.producer from provenance-schema via cross-file $ref); add a new 'source' field (referencing $defs.source); remove the 'base_seed' field; keep additionalProperties:false; embed one coherent example in the top-level 'examples' keyword. Delete skills/to-seed/resources/seed-example.json. Update to-seed/SKILL.md: Mode-2 (handoff-merge) seeds now express parent lineage via source={kind:'seed', ref:'<parent seed path>'} instead of base_seed.
acceptance_criteria: seed-schema.json schema_version is '3'
'producer' field references provenance-schema#/$defs/producer
'source' field references provenance-schema#/$defs/source
'base_seed' field is gone
additionalProperties:false is still present
One embedded example validates clean against the updated schema
skills/to-seed/resources/seed-example.json is deleted
An old v2 seed file fails validate-schema.sh with a version-mismatch message
A new v3 seed file validates clean
to-seed/SKILL.md documents Mode-2 using source={kind:'seed',ref:...} not base_seed

tasks.title: Update task-schema.json to v2
tasks.description: Update contracts/task-schema.json to schema_version 2: remove 'prd' from properties and required; add required 'producer' (referencing $defs.producer) and 'source' (referencing $defs.source) via cross-file $ref to provenance-schema. Embed one coherent example in 'examples[]' — a to-tasks-from-seed task file with HITL+AFK mix, real blocked_by chain, one browser_verify, and one follow_up whose trigger_task references a real task id in the example. Delete resources/task-schema.md. Repoint the to-tasks SKILL.md reference (currently line 75) at contracts/task-schema.json.
acceptance_criteria: task-schema.json schema_version is '2'
'prd' is removed from properties and required
'producer' and 'source' are in required and reference provenance-schema $defs
One embedded example validates clean against the updated schema
resources/task-schema.md is deleted
to-tasks SKILL.md points at contracts/task-schema.json (not the deleted resource)
An old v1 task file fails validate-schema.sh with a version-mismatch message
A new v2 task file validates clean

tasks.title: Update producer skills to stamp provenance fields
tasks.description: Update SKILL.md instructions for each lineage-producing skill to stamp 'producer' (the skill's own enum value) and 'source' ({kind, ref} or null) when writing output files. Skills to update: to-tasks (stamps task files), debug (stamps task files), code-review (stamps task files), improve-component (stamps task files), to-e2e-tasks (stamps task files), prototype (stamps task files). For each: producer is the skill's name; source is null when the file is a lineage root, or {kind, ref} when derived from an upstream artifact. Note: to-seed is already covered in T-0005.
acceptance_criteria: Each of the 6 SKILL.md files documents the producer value to stamp
Each documents when source is null vs. {kind, ref} and what ref contains
Instructions are unambiguous about which kind value applies to each skill's typical input
A task file produced by following each skill's updated instructions validates clean against task-schema v2

tasks.title: Update consumer skills for provenance field changes
tasks.description: Update the two consumer skills that read provenance fields from task files: (1) to-e2e-tasks: replace reads of 'prd' with reads of 'source.ref' for upstream context loading; when source.ref is non-null and source.kind is seed or prd, load that artifact for context; when source is null or source.kind is 'session', fall through to the existing prompt-or-skip path. (2) tasks-to-linear: derive the Linear title prefix from the task file's filename slug instead of from 'prd'; the task file always has a slug, source.ref can be null.
acceptance_criteria: to-e2e-tasks SKILL.md reads source.ref, not prd
to-e2e-tasks handles source=null and source.kind='session' without error
to-e2e-tasks loads the upstream artifact when source.ref is non-null
tasks-to-linear derives title prefix from task filename slug
tasks-to-linear does not reference prd anywhere in its logic

tasks.title: Codify producer enum maintenance in register-skill
tasks.description: Add a codified step to register-skill/SKILL.md requiring any new lineage-producing skill to append its name to the producer enum in contracts/provenance-schema.json as part of the registration process. The step should specify: the exact file to edit, the exact field to append to (the producer enum array), and that the enum value must exactly match the skill's directory name.
acceptance_criteria: register-skill/SKILL.md contains a numbered step for producer enum registration
The step names contracts/provenance-schema.json and the producer $defs path
The step specifies that the enum value must match the skill directory name exactly
The step is placed logically in the registration flow (before the skill is considered registered)
